_comment_structure: Hierarchical translation structure for better organization

emptyState.title: Welcome to Your Dashboard!
emptyState.description: You don't have any blogs yet. Create your first blog to start publishing amazing content.

quickTips.title: Quick Tips
quickTips.tip1: A blog is a collection of posts organized under one name
quickTips.tip2: You can create multiple blogs for different topics
quickTips.tip3: Each blog can have its own settings and customization

common.selectBlog: Select a blog to see more options

header.logoTagline: Your ideas, your audience, your blog.

banner.title: Start Blogging Smarter.
banner.subtitle: Build your blog in minutes — no code, no clutter, just your voice and our tools.
banner.body: Lexicon is a brand-new platform designed for creators who want simplicity, speed, and full creative control. Whether you're starting your first blog or looking for a fresh space to share your ideas, we make it easy to get started. Choose a beautiful theme, write in a clean editor, and publish instantly. Be among the first to shape the future of blogging.
banner.svgTitle: Clean blog editor window with publish highlight

creators.title: Designed for Creators
creators.body: Lexicon is built from scratch with simplicity and flexibility in mind — no clutter, no distractions, just you and your ideas.

instantSetup.title: Instant Setup
instantSetup.body: Create your blog in minutes. No technical skills required. Just pick a theme, start writing, and hit publish.

growth.title: Built to Grow With You
growth.body: Whether you're writing for fun or building a brand, Lexicon gives you the tools to evolve — from posts to pages to your own domain.

earlyVoice.title: Be an Early Voice
earlyVoice.body: You're not joining a crowd — you're helping shape a new platform. Your feedback matters, and your blog will stand out from day one.

post1.imageAlt: Person typing on a laptop with coffee beside them
post1.title: How I Wrote My First Blog Post
post1.excerpt: A fictional creator shares their journey from blank page to published post — and how easy it was with Lexicon.

post2.imageAlt: Screenshot of a clean blog layout with white space
post2.title: The Power of a Clean Theme
post2.excerpt: See how a minimalist layout can make your words shine. A sample post using one of Lexicon's starter themes.

post3.imageAlt: Open road with mountains in the background and a journal on a dashboard
post3.title: A Day in the Life of a Travel Blogger
post3.excerpt: A sample travel blog entry showing how storytelling and visuals come together beautifully on Lexicon.

post4.imageAlt: Illustration of a blog setup wizard on a laptop screen
post4.title: How to Create a Blog on Lexicon
post4.excerpt: A step-by-step guide to setting up your blog, choosing a theme, and publishing your first post.

post5.imageAlt: Notebook with brainstorming sketches and a pen
post5.title: What Should I Blog About?
post5.excerpt: Stuck on ideas? Here are 5 blog formats that work for any niche — from personal stories to tutorials.

post6.imageAlt: Whiteboard with sticky notes and feature ideas
post6.title: What's Coming to Lexicon
post6.excerpt: A transparent look at our roadmap — and how early users can help shape the future of the platform.

items.tip1: New to blogging? Here's how to launch your first post in under 10 minutes.
items.tip2: Why Lexicon was built: a note from the creator on simplicity and creative freedom.
items.tip3: Coming soon: custom domains, monetization tools, and more — help shape what's next.

about.title: About
about.body: Lexicon is a new blogging platform built for creators who value simplicity, speed, and creative control. We're just getting started — and you're invited to be part of it. Whether you're writing your first post or launching a new project, Lexicon gives you a clean, flexible way to publish and build your blog at your own pace.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.body: Have questions, ideas, or feedback? We'd love to hear from you. Lexicon is built for creators — and shaped by them.

footer.aboutText: Lexicon is a new blogging platform built for creators who value simplicity, speed, and creative control. We're just getting started — and you're invited to be part of it. Whether you're writing your first post or launching a new project, Lexicon gives you a clean, flexible way to publish and build your blog at your own pace.

create.pageSubtitle: Fill in details to set up your new blog.

update.pageSubtitle: Update details, localization, theme, SEO, and comments settings.

identity.title: Identity
identity.description: Basic information used publicly for your blog.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Choose the visual style for your blog.

seo.title: SEO
seo.description: Configure meta information and search engine visibility.

slug.label: Slug
slug.underlabel: Slug cannot be changed after creation.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Short summary of what this blog is about.

metaTitle.label: Meta Title
metaTitle.placeholder: Title shown in browser and search results

draft.title: Draft
draft.description: Not public; visible only to you and your team.

archived.title: Archived
archived.description: Hidden from the public but kept for reference.

tips.title: Tips
tips.content: Use a concise name and description. Keep your slug simple and memorable. Large images should be optimized to improve load time.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Once you delete this blog, there is no going back. All posts, comments, settings, and uploaded files will be permanently removed.

warning.title: Critical Warning:
warning.message: You are about to permanently delete

impact.title: Deletion Impact:
impact.error: Failed to load stats. Please try again.

items.images: Uploaded images (banner, logo, favicon, post images)
items.collaborators: Collaborator access ({count} users will lose access)
items.seo: SEO metadata and search engine indexing

dataProtection.title: Data Protection Notice:
dataProtection.message: All blog content, settings, and uploaded files will be permanently removed from our servers. This action is irreversible and cannot be recovered after deletion.

form.passwordUnderlabel: Password confirmation is required for security.

confirmationText.part2: and all its content will be
